overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a third-person perspective of the player character walking through a crowded, neon-lit nightclub. The scene features dense crowds of dancing NPCs, multi-level architecture with an upper balcony, and dramatic cyberpunk lighting with pink, cyan, and yellow neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded nightclub dance floor with upper balcony overlooking

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense dancing crowd on the main floor, moving toward the stage area

notable_agents.action: dancer in white outfit raising arms above head, moving rhythmically
group of dancers on upper balcony leaning against railing

entered.detail: metal safety railing on the upper level overlooking the dance floor
continuous pink LED strips running along the base of the walls
array of overhead spotlights and neon fixtures illuminating the crowd

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through a densely packed nightclub dance floor bathed in pink neon light. Above, NPCs dance and socialize on an upper balcony behind metal railings, while the crowd below moves rhythmically to the music.

scene_state.functional_zone: DJ stage area with golden spotlights and atmospheric smoke

events.description: golden yellow stage lights become prominent on the right side, creating dramatic beams through smoke

agents.ego_description: approaching the DJ booth and stage area, observing the performance space

notable_agents.action: dancer in red top and patterned pants moving energetically

entered.detail: elevated DJ platform with equipment and large LED screens
powerful golden spotlights creating volumetric lighting effects through haze
haze effects drifting across the stage area

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward the stage area where golden spotlights cut through atmospheric smoke. The DJ booth becomes visible on the right with its LED screens, while the upper balcony railing shifts to the left of the frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between main floor and rear corridor

events.description: approaching and entering the rear doorway leading to the corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowd toward the back of the club, approaching a doorway

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit dancing near the pathway

entered.detail: large dark doorway with cyan light emanating from within, leading to back areas
teal colored lighting visible through the distant doorway

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the stage, the character heads toward the rear of the club where a dark doorway emits cyan light. The crowd density decreases slightly as the camera approaches the transition to the back corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell with holographic advertisements and cyan neon lighting

events.description: character begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairwell while passing a large holographic advertisement on the wall

entered.detail: concrete staircase with metal railings leading to upper level
glowing holographic display featuring a woman with pink hair and a heart symbol
continuous cyan LED strips running along the stair railings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stairwell illuminated by cyan neon strips. A large holographic advertisement of a pink-haired woman dominates the left wall as the camera ascends the concrete stairs, leaving the main dance floor behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level lounge and bar area with red neon accents

events.description: emerging from stairwell into the upper level lounge area

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper level lounge, observing the bar area and crowd

notable_agents.action: woman in red and blue outfit walking through the lounge

entered.detail: long bar counter with stools and bottles visible behind
horizontal red LED strips running along the upper walls
glass and metal railing overlooking the main dance floor below

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper level, the scene reveals a lounge area with a bar counter on the left illuminated by red neon strips. The space overlooks the main dance floor below through glass railings, with scattered patrons walking and socializing in the teal-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, neon-lit nightclub that transitions from a crowded dance floor to a quiet, dimly lit exit. It begins with the character pushing through a dense crowd bathed in pink neon light, while NPCs socialize on an upper balcony visible above metal railings. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward the stage area where golden spotlights cut through atmospheric smoke and a DJ booth with LED screens emerges on the right. The perspective then moves away from the stage, causing the balcony railings to slide out of frame as the crowd density thins. Finally, the camera heads toward the rear of the club, approaching a dark doorway that emits a cool cyan glow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit stairwell into an expansive upper-level lounge overlooking a crowded nightclub. It begins by ascending concrete stairs within a narrow corridor illuminated by cyan neon strips, passing a towering holographic advertisement of a pink-haired woman on the left. As the camera climbs away from the main dance floor, the enclosed space opens up onto a higher balcony. The scene then shifts to a teal-lit lounge area, gliding past a bar counter accented with red neon strips. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal patrons socializing along glass railings that look down upon the vibrant activity of the club below.
